page: Microsoft Azure E8ads_v7 is an Eadsv7-family virtual machine configured with 8 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 architecture and powered by AMD processors. The instance features 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. This memory-dense allocation is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, ensuring secure and isolated virtualization.

For local storage needs, the server includes a 472 GB local disk and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. This local disk capacity provides fast temporary storage, while Premium Storage compatibility allows for high-performance persistent disk attachments. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are bundled with this instance, requiring standard network configuration for external access.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E8ads_v7 offers a resource-dense profile suitable for memory-intensive workloads without the overhead of dedicated GPU hardware. The combination of 64.0 GB of RAM, dedicated AMD vCPUs, and local storage makes this server type appropriate for relational databases, in-memory caching, data analytics, and enterprise applications requiring high memory capacity relative to compute resources.
description: Microsoft Azure E8ads_v7 is an Eadsv7-family virtual machine featuring 8 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by AMD processors and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Storage capabilities include a 472 GB local disk alongside compatibility with Premium Storage for high-performance persistent disk configurations. This server type does not include any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for memory-intensive operations, the resource profile of the E8ads_v7 is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity relative to compute power. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention, making it a reliable choice for production environments.
